seed_instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend.
org_constraint: The email must contain exactly five sentences.
new_constraint: The email must contain three paragraphs, each consisting of at least five sentences.
instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend. The email must contain exactly five sentences. The email must contain three paragraphs, each consisting of at least five sentences.
response:
Subject: Room Availability Inquiry - Next Weekend

Dear [Hotel Name] Reservations Team,

I hope this email finds you well and that your week is progressing smoothly. I am writing to inquire about the availability of a guest room for an upcoming weekend stay at your beautiful establishment. Specifically, I am interested in booking a room for next weekend, from Friday, [Insert Date], through Sunday, [Insert Date]. We are a party of [Number] people, and we are hoping to find a comfortable and well-located room. Could you please let me know what options you might have available for those specific dates?

We are very much looking forward to the possibility of visiting your hotel and experiencing its renowned hospitality. We are open to different room types, such as a standard double or a suite, depending on what availability you have on offer for that time frame. Furthermore, if there are any special packages or discounted rates available for weekend bookings, I would greatly appreciate you including that information as well. Our ideal stay would involve a relaxed weekend break, so amenities like easy access to dining or scenic views would be a big bonus. Please inform me of any policies regarding cancellation or check-in/check-out times at your earliest convenience.

Thank you so much for taking the time to review my request and for providing this detailed information. I eagerly await your reply with the current rates and any available room pictures you can share. If these dates happen to be fully booked, perhaps you could suggest alternative dates near next weekend that might have openings. Providing me with a few different options would be incredibly helpful for our travel planning process. I look forward to hearing from you soon to finalize our reservation details!

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]<turn|>
